component.name: ChatGPT Work Linux (Unofficial)
component.summary: Native community Linux client for the ChatGPT Work web experience

description.p: ChatGPT Work Linux provides an isolated GTK/WebKit desktop window for the public ChatGPT service, plus native Linux shortcuts, portal screenshots, downloads, permission controls, diagnostics, and browser compatibility fallbacks.

This is an independent community project. It is not produced, supported, or endorsed by OpenAI. Builds are produced locally from a user-supplied It does not include or execute OpenAI application binaries. The desktop icon is the unmodified official ChatGPT application icon; OpenAI owns the icon and all ChatGPT marks.
Native Rust/GTK Linux architecture and bounded upstream provenance tooling.
